notes: USD/KRW is quoted in KRW per USD; a positive r_krw therefore means KRW depreciation against the dollar. SK Hynix is KOSPI-listed and quoted in KRW, so its log return is in local currency terms.

Spearman is computed via the rank-then-rolling-correlation approach so the same 252-day window and minimum-periods rule applies to both methods. Direct .corr(method='spearman') is not available inside a rolling object in current pandas.
